race.description: Pron8ure Probiotic Paleface Stakes Mbl Pace (L)
race.comment: Boom mare CAPTAINS MISTRESS NZ (7) has been unstoppable since crossing from NZ to the Jason Grimson yard, winning her four starts by margins of between 18m and 25m. Spanked some of the best mares in the country in winning the G 1 Queen of the Pacific at Melton last start and while she tackles the boys here she is blessed with abundant speed so relishes the mile and her forms stands out. FORTY LOVE (2) was a solid fifth after working from the back row in the 4YO Bonanza last start. Had put together a string of wins or placings prior and he draws for a top-three finish. MY ULTIMATE BARNEY (8) was going well before he was also luckless when midfield after racing wide in the Bonanza. Draws a little deep but has been kept up to the mark with a trial win and is proven at this circuit and distance. CATCHAFIRE NZ (5) rises in grade but was a 2m winner in his first outing for Grimson and could step up. FERNCO NEL NZ (3) is a query off the last-start failure but had looked promising in Brisbane prior.
